query:
SELECT id, university, major, academic_level, has_skills, has_activities, match_count, hit_count, expires_at, updated_at
FROM profile_cache
ORDER BY updated_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT id, university, major, academic_level, has_skills, has_activities, match_count, hit_count, expires_at, updated_at
FROM profile_cache
ORDER BY updated_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
